dialogos.texto_en: Alrighty.
Good evening.\nI brought Raiha-chan with me.
Good evening.
Welcome.
Now we're all here.
Hey, did we all gather like this\nbecause of big bro and Yotsuba-san?
Yes, that's right.\nYou're sharp, Raiha-chan.\nThat's reassuring.
Where are those two?
They should be in the lounge\nlooking at the night view.
Eh? You set it up?
Itsuki...
Wh-why are you disappointed?!
Watching the night view while talking together\nis a classic date.\nThey might even be kissing by now.
WHA?!
Oooohh!\nBig bro's first steps to becoming a man!
Well, I wonder if Futaro-kun\nhas the courage to go that far?
Nope.
Wow, a declaration.
You're ruthless today, Miku.
I just said what was on my mind.\nThose two don't look like they're dating yet.
That's true.\nNormally, they would be happy to be alone together\nor team up as a pair, wouldn't they?
I tried to lead them in that direction during the day,\nbut like, they didn't seem to notice at ALL.
I also prepared myself to be considerate\ndepending on how their situation was,\nbut there was no such kind of atmosphere...
Well now, nothing has changed since then.\nIt's been half a year since Fu-kun\nconfessed to Yotsuba.
He was busy with college exams until now, so\nI think there's no choice but to accept that.
But now that Futaro's finally released\nfrom those exams,\nI think he can let loose a little bit.
Do you think he can really do that?
If they start getting lovey-dovey in front of us,\nthat would be a problem too...
W-well, even if they didn't have those feelings,\nit might be tough if they felt\nlike they were being pressured.
But not doing things that a couple should do\nmakes me feel uneasy,\nlike they're trying to be considerate.
But, shouldn't we be careful not to interfere too much?\nIt's their problem after all.
As her sisters, their problem is our problem.\nAlso, it's Raiha-chan's problem, isn't it?
Besides, Futaro is going to Tokyo soon.
Right! That's it!
Living alone in an unfamiliar place.\nFu-kun has been completely dependent on Raiha-chan\nup until now. He doesn't have many life skills.
Hmm, that's true.\nI'm worried if he'll be able to\nwake up alone in the morning.
If a new woman appears in front of Fu-kun,\nwho's really the one who is\ngoing to have a lonely college life%p-2;――
Yotsuba as she is now might have\nno chance against them!
Besides, long-distance relationships\nwould also be a handicap for Yotsuba.
I don't doubt their feelings,\nbut long-distance is tough, isn't it?
However, no matter what, it's unacceptable for Yotsuba\nto lose to a stranger here!
I wouldn't accept it either.
Umm, isn't the conversation jumping around too much?\nBesides, Uesugi-kun is not the kind of person\nwho is very popular with women, to put it politely.
That's kind of harsh, Itsuki-chan.
But Futaro-kun is naturally clumsy, you know?
Huh?
That's why I'm worried.
Itsuki, you also like Fu-kun, right?
W-what do you mean, I LIKE him?!
As a friend.
Well, of course. I respect him as a friend.
Then you understand, don't you?\nHow wonderful Fu-kun is.
Well, I suppose.
I'm so happy to hear my brother praised so highly!
I totally agree Raiha-chan.\nCertainly, he has many good points.
Yeah, I'm REALLY happy...
Anyway, getting back onto the subject.\nI think we need to take drastic action\nfor Fu-kun and Yotsuba's future.
WHA?! What are you planning to do?\nWe have to treat this matter delicately, you know?
I wouldn't dare to treat anything so gracelessly.
Nino isn't being very persuasive.
Right?
Did you say something?
No no, nothing.
If you're not gonna be forceful,\nwhat are you gonna do?
Let's see.\nHow about we get all nice and close with Fu-kun,\nand make Yotsuba feel like she's in a crisis?
Whaaat?!
Good idea.\nLet's do it starting tomorrow.
EHHHHHH?!
What are you gonna do, Itsuki?
Me?!\nI...c-can't do it...
Yeah, figured.\nThen, Miku and I will do it.
Ichika, Itsuki, you don't need to bother us.
Okay.\nBut, don't go too overboard, alright?
Get ready, Yotsuba.\nI said I would steal him if I saw a chance, didn't I?
I said I wouldn't 'push' them no matter what,\nand I meant it.
Ooohh. I didn't hear that.
I-Ichika! I think we need to stop this now!
Hm...
To be honest, I wonder how long those two\nwill continue their relationship like this.
Even you think so, Ichika?!
Of course, I don't mean to say that it's a bad thing.\nBut don't you think that\neven you feel that way deep down inside, Itsuki-chan?
...I did ask Yotsuba once,\n'How long are you going to use polite language?'
Also, I can't really tell Uesugi-kun's attitude\ntowards Yotsuba, and it's bothering me.
Yeah, that's true.\nI'd also want to see more masculinity from Futaro-kun.
Big bro is bad at communication\nand new at love,\nso it's pretty hard to deal with him, huh.
I really do think he's gotten better with us, though.
Anyway, we should watch over them for now.\nIf things get worse, we'll step in.
...Alright.\nLet's watch them for a while.
My big bro is pretty dang weird,\nbut please take care of him.
So, Nino? How long do you plan on doing this strategy,\neven if it means it makes Yotsuba feel bad?
Well...
How about we make it a goal to have her\nstop using honorifics%p-2;――
Or, start calling Fu-kun by his name during this trip,\nand end the strategy there?
It seems like everyone is worried about that.
I'm worried too.\nIt's strange that Futaro\ndoesn't seem to be bothered by it.
But isn't that goal too difficult to achieve\nduring this trip...?
Well really, an easy goal would be meaningless,\nwouldn't it?
...Alright then.
Okay, it's settled!\nMiku, the plan starts tomorrow!
Roger.
Do your best, Yotsuba.
